slides.heading: Uguquko lwezoShishino eBritani nakumazantsi e-Afrika
slides.lead: Indlela umphunga (steam), imizi-mveliso nezixeko ezayiguqula ngayo iBritani - kunye nendlela olo guquko olwafika ngayo kumazantsi e-Afrika.

image.alt: Umzi-mveliso oneziqhoqhotho ezide ezikhupha umsi ecaleni koololiwe womphunga, phantsi kwesibhakabhaka esiluthuthu esi-orenji.
image.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 320 180' role='img'><rect width='320' height='180' fill='#efe7d8'/><rect y='128' width='320' height='52' fill='#8c7a5c'/><rect x='40' y='70' width='90' height='58' fill='#5a4a37'/><rect x='58' y='30' width='16' height='40' fill='#3f342a'/><rect x='92' y='38' width='16' height='32' fill='#3f342a'/><circle cx='66' cy='24' r='12' fill='#cfc3ad' opacity='0.8'/><circle cx='100' cy='30' r='10' fill='#cfc3ad' opacity='0.8'/><rect x='170' y='96' width='96' height='32' rx='5' fill='#7a1f1f'/><rect x='176' y='78' width='30' height='20' fill='#5c1414'/><circle cx='188' cy='132' r='12' fill='#2f2a24'/><circle cx='248' cy='132' r='12' fill='#2f2a24'/><rect x='150' y='124' width='120' height='6' fill='#4a4033'/><circle cx='262' cy='46' r='24' fill='#e8a13a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Qalisa ngokubuza abafundi ukuba zeziphi izixhobo nezinto zolonwabo abazisebenzisa yonke imihla ezidinga imizi-mveliso, umbane okanye amafutha ukuze zibekho. Chaza iindawo ezimbini zesi sifundo: kuqala uGuquko lwezoShishino olwaqala eBritani, emva koko indlela imfuno yezinto eziluhlaza, iimarike nabasebenzi eyatsala ngayo umazantsi e-Afrika kwelo hlabathi lezoshishino - ngokukodwa ngedayimani negolide. Chaza igama elithi 'uguquko' njengotshintsho olukhawulezayo, olunzulu kwindlela abantu abaphila nabasebenza ngayo.

slides.heading: Yayiyintoni uGuquko lwezoShishino?
slides.lead: Ukususela malunga neminyaka yee-1760, iBritani yatshintsha ukusuka ekwenzeni iimpahla ngezandla ukuya ekuzenzeni ngoomatshini kwimizi-mveliso.

blocks.text: **UGuquko lwezoShishino (Industrial Revolution)** yayilixesha, elaqala eBritani phakathi kweminyaka yee-1700, apho oomatshini abatsha kunye nemithombo emitsha yamandla yavumela abantu ukuba bavelise iimpahla ngokukhawuleza nangobuninzi obungakumbi kunakuqala. Umsebenzi waphuma emakhaya nakwii-workshops ezincinci wangena kwimizi-mveliso emikhulu (**factories**).

items: Ngaphambili: abantu abaninzi babelima umhlaba baze benza iimpahla ngezandla emakhaya.
Emva koko: abantu abaninzi babesebenza oomatshini kwimizi-mveliso ezidolophini nasezixekweni.
IBritani yayikhokela kuba yayinamalahle, insimbi, imali yokutyala nezindlela zorhwebo kulo lonke ubukhosi bayo.

slides.notes: Gxininisa ukuqhubeka notshintsho. Abantu babesoloko besenza ilaphu, izixhobo nembiza - kodwa ngezandla nangobuncinci. Uguquko lwaluseluphuhlisweni nasekukhawulezeni. Yazisa umbono wokuba iBritani yaqala phambili kuba yayinobutyebi nezinto eziluhlaza ezazithathwa kumathanga ayo aphesheya kolwandle, into ebaluleka xa sifika kumazantsi e-Afrika.

slides.heading: Amandla omphunga (steam power)
slides.lead: Injini yomphunga yanika imizi-mveliso umthombo wamandla onamandla nothembekileyo ongaxhomekekanga emilanjeni okanye emoyeni.

blocks.text: Oomatshini bokuqala babeqhutywa ngamavili amanzi, ngoko imizi-mveliso kwakufuneka yakhiwe ecaleni kwemilambo ekhawulezayo. Kwiminyaka yee-1760 nee-1770 injineli yaseSkotlani **James Watt** wayiphucula kakhulu **injini yomphunga (steam engine)**, eyayitshisa amalahle ukubilisa amanzi neqhube oomatshini. Ngoku umzi-mveliso wawunokwakhiwa naphi na.

items: Iinjini zomphunga zazikhupha amanzi kwimigodi enzulu yamalahle neyensimbi.
Zaziqhuba oomatshini bokusonta nabokuluka kwimizi-mveliso yamalaphu.
Kamva zaqhuba oololiwe neenqanawa, zihambisa iimpahla nabantu ngokukhawuleza.

image.alt: Ibhojari yenjini yomphunga enepistoni nevili elikhulu elijikelezayo, kunye nomphunga onyukayo.
image.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#efe7d8'/><rect x='30' y='78' width='70' height='48' rx='6' fill='#6b3a2e'/><rect x='40' y='60' width='14' height='18' fill='#4a281f'/><circle cx='47' cy='52' r='9' fill='#cfc3ad' opacity='0.85'/><circle cx='58' cy='42' r='7' fill='#cfc3ad' opacity='0.7'/><rect x='100' y='96' width='36' height='10' fill='#7a5a3a'/><circle cx='168' cy='101' r='34' fill='none' stroke='#3f342a' stroke-width='8'/><circle cx='168' cy='101' r='6' fill='#3f342a'/><rect x='30' y='126' width='150' height='8' fill='#4a4033'/></svg>

slides.notes: Yigcine ilula inzululwazi: fudumeza amanzi abe ngumphunga, umphunga utyhala ipistoni, ipistoni ijikelezisa ivili eliqhuba oomatshini. Inkululeko ephambili injini kaWatt eyayinika yona yayiyindawo yokuma - imizi-mveliso yayingasadingi kuhlala emlanjeni. Nxulumanisa phambili: amalahle, amafutha awondla injini yomphunga, aba ngamanye amashishini akhula ngokukhawuleza.

slides.heading: Inkqubo yemizi-mveliso
slides.lead: Oomatshini, abasebenzi neeyure ezimisiweyo zahlanganiswa phantsi kophahla olunye.

blocks.heading: Oomatshini
blocks.text: Oomatshini abakhulu abaqhutywa ngamandla babesenza ngemizuzu oko kwakuthatha iiyure ngesandla kumsebenzi.

blocks.heading: Iwotshi
blocks.text: Abasebenzi kwakufuneka bafike ngexesha basebenze amatoho amade amiselweyo aqashelwa yintsimbi yomzi-mveliso.

blocks.heading: Imivuzo
blocks.text: Abantu babengasenzi impahla epheleleyo; babehlawulwa umvuzo ukuze benze umsebenzi omnye omncinci imini yonke.

slides.notes: Sebenzisa ezi khadi zithathu ukuchaza okwakutsha ngomsebenzi wemizi-mveliso: uqeqesho lwexesha, ukwahlulwa komsebenzi ube yimisebenzi emincinci ephindwaphindwayo, kunye nokuxhomekeka emvuzweni endaweni yomhlaba okanye ubugcisa. Cela abafundi bathelekise oku nendlela umsebenzi owawuququzelelwa ngayo ngaphambili - ekhaya, ngesantya sosapho. Oku kumisela ilahleko yobuntu kwislayidi esilandelayo.

slides.heading: Amalahle, insimbi noololiwe
slides.lead: Amashishini amatsha nezothutho ezitsha zazondlana zaza zasasazeka kulo lonke elaseBritani.

blocks.text: Iinjini zomphunga zazidinga **amalahle (coal)**, oomatshini neereyile zazenziwa **ngensimbi (iron)** kamva isiliti, kwaye **oololiwe (railways)** bomphunga babethwala konke oku ngokukhawuleza kulo lonke ilizwe. Ngo-1830 kwavulwa uHola-kaloliwe iLiverpool and Manchester Railway, obonisa indlela abantu neempahla ababenokuhamba ngokukhawuleza.

items: Ukumba amalahle nokwenza insimbi kwakhula kwaba ngamashishini amakhulu.
Oololiwe nemijelo (canals) yayidibanisa imigodi, imizi-mveliso, iidolophu namazibuko.
Iinqanawa zomphunga zazithwala iimpahla zaseBritani - zize neento eziluhlaza - kulo lonke ubukhosi.

image.alt: Uloliwe womphunga ezireyileni etsala iinqwelo zamalahle edlula isiginali.
image.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#efe7d8'/><rect y='118' width='240' height='42' fill='#8c7a5c'/><rect x='30' y='70' width='60' height='42' rx='5' fill='#7a1f1f'/><rect x='36' y='52' width='16' height='18' fill='#5c1414'/><circle cx='44' cy='44' r='9' fill='#cfc3ad' opacity='0.8'/><rect x='96' y='84' width='40' height='28' fill='#3f342a'/><rect x='142' y='84' width='40' height='28' fill='#3f342a'/><circle cx='46' cy='116' r='9' fill='#2f2a24'/><circle cx='78' cy='116' r='9' fill='#2f2a24'/><circle cx='112' cy='116' r='8' fill='#2f2a24'/><circle cx='158' cy='116' r='8' fill='#2f2a24'/><rect x='20' y='124' width='200' height='5' fill='#4a4033'/><rect x='206' y='70' width='6' height='42' fill='#5a4a37'/><circle cx='209' cy='72' r='6' fill='#e8a13a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Bonisa iketane lokuchukumisana: umphunga udinga amalahle, oomatshini neereyile zidinga insimbi, oololiwe bathwala zombini baze bavule iimarike ezintsha. Yiyo loo nto ababhali-mbali beluthi 'uguquko' - utshintsho olunye lwabangela olunye. Gqamisa unxulumano nobukhosi (iinqanawa zomphunga norhwebo) kuba ludibanisa ngokuthe ngqo nesizathu sokuba iBritani yandela kwiindawo ezifana nomazantsi e-Afrika.

slides.heading: Ukukhula kwezixeko (urbanisation)
slides.lead: Imizi-mveliso yatsala abantu abaninzi kakhulu emaphandleni ukuya kwiidolophu ezazikhula ngokukhawuleza.

blocks.text: **Ukukhula kwezixeko (urbanisation)** kuthetha ukwanda kweedolophu nezixeko njengoko abantu befudukela kuzo. Njengoko imizi-mveliso yayivula, iintsapho zazishiya amafama zifuna umsebenzi, kwaye izixeko ezinjenge-Manchester ne-Birmingham zazikhula ngokukhawuleza. Izindlu, amanzi kunye nococeko kwakusoloko kungakwazi ukuhambelana.

items: Abasebenzi babexinene kwizindlu ezitshiphu, ezicutheneyo kufuphi nemizi-mveliso.
Ukuxinana nococeko olubi kwakusasaza izifo.
Okokuqala, amazwe amaninzi ayenabantu abaninzi abahlala ezidolophini kunasemhlabeni.

image.alt: Imigca yezindlu ezimxinwa ezixineneyo eneziqhoqhotho ezihlangene ngokusondeleyo.
image.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#efe7d8'/><rect y='126' width='240' height='34' fill='#8c7a5c'/><g fill='#7a5a3a'><rect x='16' y='78' width='34' height='48'/><rect x='54' y='70' width='34' height='56'/><rect x='92' y='80' width='34' height='46'/><rect x='130' y='68' width='34' height='58'/><rect x='168' y='82' width='34' height='44'/><rect x='206' y='74' width='28' height='52'/></g><g fill='#3f342a'><rect x='24' y='60' width='7' height='18'/><rect x='62' y='52' width='7' height='18'/><rect x='138' y='50' width='7' height='18'/><rect x='176' y='64' width='7' height='18'/></g><g fill='#cdd6b5'><rect x='26' y='92' width='12' height='14'/><rect x='64' y='86' width='12' height='14'/><rect x='102' y='94' width='12' height='14'/><rect x='140' y='84' width='12' height='14'/><rect x='178' y='96' width='12' height='14'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Chaza ngokucacileyo ukukhula kwezixeko kuba ligama eliphambili le-CAPS kwaye libuya xa sijonga uMzantsi Afrika. Lungelelanisa umfanekiso: izixeko zazinika umsebenzi nemivuzo, kodwa izixeko zokuqala zezoshishino zazixinene kwaye zingaphilanga kakuhle. Buza abafundi ukuba idolophu yabo okanye isixeko esikufuphi sakhula ngenxa yemisebenzi - dibanisa lo mbono nehlabathi labo.

slides.heading: Utshintsho lwentlalo neemeko zomsebenzi
slides.lead: Uguquko lwadala ubutyebi obukhulu kwabathile lwaza lwadala umsebenzi onzima nonobungozi kubaninzi.

blocks.text: Abanini bemizi-mveliso norhwebo baba zizityebi, kwaza kwavela **udidi oluphakathi (middle class)** olutsha. Kodwa abasebenzi abaninzi - kuquka abasetyhini nabantwana - babesebenza iiyure ezinde kwimizi-mveliso nemigodi enobungozi ngomvuzo ophantsi. Ngokuhamba kwexesha, abasebenzi bakha **imibutho yabasebenzi (trade unions)** baza balwela imithetho yokubakhusela.

items: Abantwana babesebenza kwimizi-mveliso nasemigodini, kwaye abaninzi benzakala. [SME] Qinisekisa naliphi na ubudala okanye izibalo ezithile phambi kokuba usebenzise.
Abahlaziyi baphumelela imithetho enciphisa iiyure zomsebenzi nomsebenzi wabantwana.
Uluntu lwahlulahlulwa ngokugqithisileyo lwaba ludidi lwabanini abazizityebi nodidi lwabasebenzi.

image.alt: Isikali silinganisa ingxowa yeengqekembe ngokuchasene nomfanekiso womsebenzi, sibonisa ukungalingani.
image.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#efe7d8'/><rect x='106' y='30' width='8' height='96' fill='#5a4a37'/><rect x='70' y='30' width='80' height='6' fill='#5a4a37'/><line x1='78' y1='36' x2='78' y2='70' stroke='#5a4a37' stroke-width='3'/><line x1='142' y1='36' x2='142' y2='58' stroke='#5a4a37' stroke-width='3'/><circle cx='78' cy='80' r='16' fill='#e8a13a'/><text x='78' y='85' font-size='14' text-anchor='middle' fill='#5c3a10'>R</text><g fill='#2f5233'><circle cx='142' cy='66' r='8'/><rect x='136' y='74' width='12' height='20'/></g><rect x='70' y='126' width='80' height='6' fill='#4a4033'/></svg>

slides.notes: Yiphathe ngokunetyala le nto: injongo kukuba uphuhliso lwezoshishino lwazisa inkqubela nobunzima ngexesha elinye. Gxininisa unobangela nesiphumo - iimeko ezimbi zaqhubela abasebenzi ekuhlanganiseni imibutho nasekulweleni imithetho yohlaziyo. Uphawu lwe-[SME] lubonisa inkcukacha yomsebenzi wabantwana: yigcine ijikelele ngaphandle kokuba umphengululi unika ubudala okanye izibalo eziqinisekisiweyo. Lo mbono wodidi lwabanini abazizityebi nodidi lwabasebenzi udlulela ngokuthe ngqo kwimigodi yoMzantsi Afrika.

slides.heading: Iindidi zezinto ezisungulwe notshintsho eBritani

blocks.alt: Ithayimlayini yeento eziphambili ezasungulwa kuGuquko lwezoShishino ukususela kwiminyaka yee-1760 ukuya kwi-1840.

events.label: UJames Watt uthatha ilungelo lokuveliswa kwenjini yakhe yomphunga ephuculweyo
I-power loom yenza ukuluka kusetyenziswe oomatshini
Uloliwe womphunga wokuqala kawonke-wonke (Stockton ukuya Darlington)
Kuvulwa uHola-kaloliwe iLiverpool and Manchester Railway

slides.notes: Sebenzisa le thayimlayini ukuqinisa inxalenye yaseBritani yesi sifundo phambi kokuwelela kumazantsi e-Afrika. Cela abafundi babone ipatheni: oomatshini bamalaphu kuqala, emva koko amandla omphunga, emva koko oololiwe abathwala yonke into. Qaphela ukuba le mihla ziindawo zotshintsho ezimalunga, hayi kuphela nje iziganeko ezibalulekileyo. [SME] Umphengululi kufuneka aqinisekise imihla echanekileyo ngokuchasene nethayimlayini yezinto ezasungulwayo ye-SAHO phambi kokuprinta.

slides.heading: Isizathu sokuba uguquko lufike kumazantsi e-Afrika
slides.lead: IBritani yezoshishino yayidinga izinto eziluhlaza, iimarike ezintsha nabasebenzi abatshiphu - yaza yajonga kumathanga ayo.

blocks.text: Imizi-mveliso yaseBritani yayidinga **izinto eziluhlaza (raw materials)** ezifana nomqhaphu, uboya nezinsimbi, kwaye abarhwebi bayo babefuna **iimarike ezintsha (new markets)** zokuthengisa iimpahla ezigqityiweyo. Oku kwaqhuba iBritani ukuba yandise ubukhosi bayo, kuquka nakumazantsi e-Afrika. Xa kwafunyanwa idayimani emva koko igolide apha, olo tsalo lwaba namandla kakhulu.

items: Uqoqosho lwezoshishino lwaludinga izinto amathanga awayenokuzinika.
Imali noomatshini baseBritani bangena ukuba bemba nokwakha oololiwe.
Oku kudla ngokubizwa ngokuba **nguGuquko lweMinerali (Mineral Revolution)** eMzantsi Afrika.

slides.notes: Dibanisa ngokucacileyo iinxalenye ezimbini zesi sifundo. Amandla akhethekileyo aphuhlisa iBritani ngezoshishino - ukulambela izinto eziluhlaza, iimarike nenzuzo - aphinda-lungiselela umazantsi e-Afrika. Yazisa igama elithi 'uGuquko lweMinerali' njengegama lasekhaya lotshintsho olukhawulezayo lwezoshishino loMzantsi Afrika, oluqhutywa kukumba kwezimbiwa endaweni yamalaphu. Le yindawo yenguqu yesi sifundo.

slides.heading: Idayimani nokumbiwa kweKimberley
slides.lead: Ukufunyanwa kwedayimani kwaguqula ummandla othuleyo waba yidolophu yokumba ekhawulezayo phantse ngobusuku obunye.

blocks.text: Ukususela ku-1867 kwafunyanwa idayimani kufuphi nemilambo iOrange neVaal, kwaza kwaqala umjaho omkhulu kummandla owaba yi**Kimberley**. Amawaka abambi ombayo kwaphuhla umngxuma odumileyo iBig Hole. Ngo-1888 **uCecil John Rhodes** wahlanganisa imigodi phantsi kwenkampani yakhe, **iDe Beers Consolidated Mines**, wafumana ulawulo lwesixa esikhulu sedayimani yehlabathi.

items: IKimberley yakhula yaba yenye yeedolophu ezinkulu kumazantsi e-Afrika.
Abambi abancinci batyhalelwa ngaphandle njengoko iinkampani ezizizityebi zithathela phezulu.
Abasebenzi abamnyama babehlala kwiikhampu ezivaliweyo behlawulwa kancinci kunabasebenzi abamhlophe.

image.alt: Umngxuma womgodi ovulekileyo onzulu one-teres omilise okwefaneli, unabantu abancinci phezulu.
image.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#efe7d8'/><rect y='40' width='220' height='24' fill='#b7a17a'/><path d='M10 64 L210 64 L150 150 L70 150 Z' fill='#6b5236'/><path d='M28 64 L192 64 L140 132 L80 132 Z' fill='#7a5f40'/><path d='M48 64 L172 64 L128 112 L92 112 Z' fill='#8a6d49'/><path d='M70 64 L150 64 L118 96 L102 96 Z' fill='#5a4630'/><g fill='#3f342a'><rect x='40' y='54' width='4' height='10'/><rect x='96' y='54' width='4' height='10'/><rect x='160' y='54' width='4' height='10'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: IKimberley ngumzekelo wokuqala ocacileyo woGuquko lweMinerali. Imibono emibini emikhulu: umjaho wadala idolophu enkulu yezoshishino ngaphakathi elizweni, kwaye ulawulo lwakhawuleza ludlula kubambi abaninzi abancinci ludlulela kwiinkampani ezimbalwa ezinamandla ezikhokelwa nguRhodes. Yazisa inkqubo yeekhampu nomsebenzi wokufuduka ngobunono apha; islayidi esilandelayo siyayiphuhlisa. [SME] Qinisekisa iframu ye-Eureka (1867) ngokuchasene ne-Kimberley 'New Rush' (1871) ukuba kufuneka imihla echanekileyo.

slides.heading: Igolide kwiWitwatersrand
slides.lead: Ukufunyanwa kwegolide ngo-1886 kwadala iJohannesburg kwaza kwenza uMzantsi Afrika ube sembindini woqoqosho lwehlabathi.

blocks.text: Ngo-1886 kwafunyanwa umthanjana omkhulu wegolide kwi**Witwatersrand**, yaza idolophu yokumba iJohannesburg yaphuhla ngeenyanga ezimbalwa. Igolide yayilele nzulu phantsi komhlaba, ngoko ukuyimba kwakudinga oomatshini abaxabisayo, iinkampani ezinkulu nabasebenzi abaninzi kakhulu.

items: IJohannesburg yaba sisixeko esikhula ngokukhawuleza kunazo zonke kumazantsi e-Afrika.
Ukumba okunzulu kwakudinga imali eninzi, ngoko iindlu zokumba zakhula zaba namandla kakhulu.
Igolide yenza uMzantsi Afrika ubaluleke eBritani nakuqoqosho lonke lwehlabathi.

image.alt: Inqaba ende yokumba (headgear) enevili elizombelezayo ngaphezu komngxunya, kunye nolitye lwegolide ngezantsi.
image.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 200 160' role='img'><rect width='200' height='160' fill='#efe7d8'/><rect y='130' width='200' height='30' fill='#8c7a5c'/><path d='M70 130 L86 40 L114 40 L130 130 Z' fill='none' stroke='#5a4a37' stroke-width='6'/><line x1='78' y1='90' x2='122' y2='90' stroke='#5a4a37' stroke-width='5'/><line x1='74' y1='60' x2='126' y2='60' stroke='#5a4a37' stroke-width='5'/><circle cx='100' cy='40' r='14' fill='none' stroke='#3f342a' stroke-width='5'/><rect x='150' y='108' width='16' height='12' fill='#e8a13a'/><rect x='158' y='96' width='16' height='12' fill='#e8a13a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Thelekisa idayimani negolide. Idayimani yayinokucholwa phezu komhlaba ekuqaleni; igolide yaseWitwatersrand yayinzulu kwaye isezantsi ngobunjani, ngoko ukususela ekuqaleni yayidinga oomatshini abanzima, imingxunya enzulu nemali eninzi. Yiyo loo nto iinkampani ezinamandla zokumba nabasebenzi abaninzi kakhulu bavela ngokukhawuleza. IJohannesburg ngumzekelo ocacileyo woMzantsi Afrika wokukhula kwezixeko okuqhutywa lushishino.

slides.heading: Umsebenzi wokufuduka, iikhampu nezixeko ezintsha
slides.lead: Imigodi yaguqula apho nendlela abantu bomazantsi e-Afrika ababehlala nababesebenza ngayo.

blocks.text: Imigodi yayidinga abasebenzi abaninzi kakhulu, abatshiphu. Amadoda amaninzi amnyama ayehamba imigama emide ukusuka emaphandleni esiya kusebenza emigodini iinyanga ngexesha - inkqubo **yomsebenzi wokufuduka (migrant labour)** - ngoxa iintsapho zawo zisala ngasemva. Abasebenzi babehlala kwii**khampu (compounds)** ezixinene, behlawulwa imivuzo ephantsi kwaye kufuneka bephethe **iipasi (passes)** ezazilawula ukuhamba kwabo.

items: Iirhafu nokuphulukana nomhlaba kwatyhalela amadoda amaninzi asemaphandleni ukuba afune umsebenzi emigodini.
Ukwahlulwa ngobuhlanga kwimivuzo nakwizindlu kwakwakhelwe kwinkqubo yokumba.
Lo mxube womsebenzi wokufuduka nolawulo ngobuhlanga waguqula uMzantsi Afrika kude kube semva ko-1900.

image.alt: Umgca wemifanekiso yabasebenzi behamba besiya kwizakhiwo zomgodi, bephethe imithwalo.
image.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#efe7d8'/><rect y='124' width='240' height='36' fill='#8c7a5c'/><rect x='150' y='60' width='70' height='64' fill='#6b5236'/><rect x='160' y='74' width='16' height='16' fill='#cdd6b5'/><rect x='188' y='74' width='16' height='16' fill='#cdd6b5'/><g fill='#3f342a'><circle cx='34' cy='78' r='10'/><rect x='27' y='90' width='14' height='34'/><circle cx='70' cy='74' r='10'/><rect x='63' y='86' width='14' height='38'/><circle cx='106' cy='80' r='10'/><rect x='99' y='92' width='14' height='32'/></g><g fill='#7a5a3a'><rect x='22' y='70' width='10' height='10'/><rect x='60' y='66' width='10' height='10'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Esi sesona slayidi sinovakalelo - siphathe ngokweenyani nangononophelo. Uqoqosho lweminerali aluzange lwadala ubutyebi nezixeko kuphela; lwadala inkqubo yomsebenzi wokufuduka, iikhampu, imivuzo ephantsi ngobuhlanga nolawulo lweepasi olwabangela ubunzima benyani lwaza lwahlula iintsapho. Yenza unxulumano nenxalenye yaseBritani: kanye njengoko abasebenzi baseBritani babejongene neemeko ezinzima noluntu olwahlukileyo, uqoqosho lokumba loMzantsi Afrika lwavelisa ukungalingani okunzulu - apha okwakhelwe ngokobuhlanga. Oku kudibanisa phambili nemixholo yakamva yocalucalulo nengcinezelo.

slides.heading: Ithelekiso leBritani nomazantsi e-Afrika
slides.lead: Amandla afanayo ezoshishino avelisa utshintsho olufanayo kwiindawo ezimbini ezahluke kakhulu.

items: Yaqhutywa ngumphunga, amalahle nemizi-mveliso yamalaphu.
Izixeko ezinjenge-Manchester zakhula ngokukhawuleza.
Udidi oluphakathi olutsha nodidi lwabasebenzi.
Yaqhutywa kukumba idayimani negolide.
Izixeko ezinjengeKimberley neJohannesburg zakhula ngokukhawuleza.
Abanini bemigodi abazizityebi nabasebenzi abafudukayo abahlulwe ngobuhlanga.

slides.notes: Sebenzisa esi slayidi secala-ngasecaleni ukukhupha isakhono se-CAPS sokuthelekisa. Ukufana: ukukhula okukhawulezayo kwezoshishino, izixeko ezikhula ngokukhawuleza, ukwahlulwa okunzulu kwentlalo phakathi kwabanini nabasebenzi. Umahluko ophambili: eMzantsi Afrika oko kwahlulahlulwa kwakuququzelelwe ngobuhlanga, kwaye abasebenzi ubukhulu becala babengabafuduki. Yenza abafundi bacebise ukufana okunye nomahluko omnye ngamazwi abo phambi kokuba utyhile iikholamu.

slides.heading: Esikufundileyo
slides.lead: Umphunga nemizi-mveliso zaguqula iBritani; idayimani negolide zatsala umazantsi e-Afrika kwelo hlabathi linye lezoshishino.

blocks.text: UGuquko lwezoShishino lwasusa umsebenzi lwawusa kwimizi-mveliso eqhutywa ngoomatshini, lwazalisa izixeko ngabantu, lwaza lwahlula uluntu lwaba ngabanini nabasebenzi. Imfuno yaseBritani yezinto neemarike, kunye nokufunyanwa **kwedayimani (diamonds)** kunye **negolide (gold)**, kwazisa olu tshintsho lukhawulezayo lwezoshishino kumazantsi e-Afrika ngendlela **yoGuquko lweMinerali (Mineral Revolution)**.

blocks.question: Chaza indlela injini yomphunga eyaguqula ngayo indlela iimpahla ezaziveliswa ngayo eBritani.
Chaza iindlela ezimbini ukufunyanwa kwedayimani negolide okwaguqula ngazo ubomi kumazantsi e-Afrika.
Nika indlela enye utshintsho lwezoshishino olwalufana ngayo eBritani nakumazantsi e-Afrika, nendlela enye ekwakwahluke ngayo.

slides.notes: Vala ngokubuyela kumbuzo wesihloko: lwafika njani utshintsho lwaseBritani kumazantsi e-Afrika? Phinda-fingqa iketane - umphunga nemizi-mveliso, ukukhula kwezixeko, ukwahlulwa kwentlalo, emva koko loo mandla afanayo efika apha ngokumba. Sebenzisa imibuzo emithathu njengomsebenzi obhaliweyo okanye ingxoxo; ukwabiwa kweemakisi kulandela iindlela ze-CAPS ezisekelwe kumthombo nezokubhala okwandisiweyo. Khumbuza abafundi ukuba lo mxholo umisela umsebenzi wakamva ngokwandisa amathanga, iMfazwe yoMzantsi Afrika nocalucalulo.
